title: Proof Boundary — Media Blitz Is the Publishing Subsystem
supported_claims: The repository separates corpus construction, governance, runtime, visual, and publication layers.
Media Blitz OS functions as the publication and distribution subsystem inside the broader Nelson Knowledge System.
Canonical artifacts can produce multiple publication and derivative outputs.
unsupported_claims: The system has already produced measured audience growth or commercial outcomes.
All publication platforms are directly automated.
The current repository structure is the permanent production architecture.
